---
title: "Projects"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---

## Current Projects

Under construction! Coming soon!

## Current Projects/Analyses

[Suspension Levels for Students with Disabilities in California Districts](https://html-preview.github.io/?url=https://github.com/jpedroza1228/projects_portfolio_and_practice/blob/main/projects/student_suspensions/ca_student_suspension.html)
